headings.text: Know what to shut off when Dave isn’t there.
The binder in the office isn’t a system. Neither is Dave’s memory.
One locate visit’s money. Knowledge that stays.
Built like the tools you already trust: no tricks, no lock-in.
Send your map. We’ll take the first look — free.

sampleText: Skip to content UtilityBinder Live demo Sample PDF $499 Pilot INDEPENDENT CAMPGROUNDS · RV PARKS · OUTDOOR PROPERTIES Know what to shut off when Dave isn’t there. UtilityBinder turns your park’s old maps, staff memory, photos, and repair notes into a private emergency reference for shutoffs, breakers, cleanouts, valves, meters, pumps, and utility trouble spots. Built for you, not by you — we do the conversion. Send your map — free 15-minute review See pilot pricing Or poke around first: try the live demo park. No signup for any of it. UtilityBinder is for internal emergency reference and maintenance records only. It is not a utility locate, survey, or excavation clearance. Call 811 before digging; private utilities may require a private locator. WATER · SHUTOFF V-07 CONTROLS Sites 31–46 WHERE Behind shed, west side of Row C — round cover under the hose reel MEDIUM CONFIDENCE DAVE + PHOTO · VER. 2026-06-02 EMERGENCY REFERENCE ONLY — not a utility locate. Call 811 before digging. SOURCED RESEARCH — EVERY CLAIM LINKS OUT The binder in the office isn’t a system. Neither is Dave’s memory. Hospitals and school districts pay for instant shutoff maps. Your park’s version is a paper map from 1998, photos on one person’s phone, and whatever the last contractor remembers. 811 WON'T MARK YOUR LINES 811 marks public utilities up to the meter. Your pedestal feeds, water loops, and sewer runs are private lines — legally your responsibility, and unmapped by default. SOURCES Missouri 811 Kentucky 811 196,977 DAMAGE EVENTS · 2024 Reported strikes on buried utilities in the US and Canada — and the industry's own root-cause analysis points at inaccurate maps, lost records, and abandoned facilities. SOURCES CGA DIRT Report 2024 $500–1,000 PER LOCATE VISIT A private locator marks lines with
title: UtilityBinder — Know what to shut off when Dave isn't there

sampleText: Skip to content UtilityBinder Live demo Sample PDF $499 Pilot LIVE DEMO · FICTIONAL DATA Staff Emergency Map This is Big Pine Family Campground — a fictional park with deliberately imperfect records, because honest provenance is the product. Some valves are verified and tested; one is on a 1998 paper map and has never been found. Your park looks like this too. Staff memory record — NOT a utility locate. Do not rely on this for excavation. Call 811 before digging; private lines may require a private utility locator. RUN A SCENARIO 2 a.m. — water spraying at Site 42 Sewer backup near 41 Pedestal dead at 37 Find the propane shutoff 14 ASSETS · 11 DEPENDENCIES · 3 NEVER VERIFIED 2 A.M. MODE LAYERS Water Sewer Electric Gas / Propane Irrigation Unknown W-01 V-01 V-03 V-04 V-07 C-01 C-02 C-04 P-01 P-02 P-03 G-01 IR-01 X-01 + − Tap a site pad to see what controls it · tap an asset tag for its record SITE NUMBER OR CABIN Type a site number, or tap the map. Try 42 (the classic 2 a.m. water leak) or 22 (the frozen-line incident). IF THIS WERE REAL Your emergency contacts and local 811 info would be pinned here. Call 811 before any digging — always. UtilityBinder Emergency utility records for the things only your maintenance person knows. Built for independent campgrounds, RV parks, and outdoor properties. ARTIFACTS Staff Emergency Map demo Sample Emergency PDF The Dave Sheet BEFORE YOU DIG 811 Always. Private lines may also require a private locator. UtilityBinder is for internal emergency reference and maintenance records only. It is not a utility locate, survey, or excavation clearance. Call 811 before digging; private utilities may require a private locator. © 2026 UtilityBinder · Demo content uses fictional data only
title: Staff Emergency Map — live demo | UtilityBinder

sampleText: Skip to content UtilityBinder Live demo Sample PDF $499 Pilot SAMPLE ARTIFACT · FICTIONAL DATA The UtilityBinder Emergency PDF This is the artifact that goes on the shop wall, laminated by the door, and in the truck glovebox. Use your browser’s print dialog (or the button) to see the real thing — the watermark and safety disclaimers are built into every page of the template by design. Print / Save as PDF Staff memory record — NOT a utility locate. Do not rely on this for excavation. Call 811 before digging; private lines may require a private utility locator. PRINTED FOR EMERGENCY REFERENCE ONLY — Staff memory record — NOT a utility locate. Do not rely on this for excavation. Call 811 before digging; private lines may require a private utility locator. Data as of 2026-06-11. Emergency Shutoff Map — Overview Big Pine Family Campground (fictional demo) EMERGENCY REFERENCE ONLY · NOT A UTILITY LOCATE · CALL 811 BEFORE DIGGING W-01 V-01 V-03 V-04 V-07 C-01 C-02 C-04 P-01 P-02 P-03 G-01 IR-01 X-01 Water Sewer Electric Gas / Propane Irrigation Data / Comms Unknown Pin positions are approximate, recorded from staff walks and photos — good enough to find a shutoff, never good enough to dig by. Water System Big Pine Family Campground (fictional demo) EMERGENCY REFERENCE ONLY · NOT A UTILITY LOCATE · CALL 811 BEFORE DIGGING Asset Where it is What it affects Trust level W-01 pump Inside well house, disconnect on left wall controls sites 1–48, CB1, CB2, CB3, CB4 Pump disconnect — stops supply without closing V-01. High confidence Tested (shut off & observed) Verified 2026-04-18 V-01 valve Main shutoff, green cover 10 ft east of well house door controls sites 1–48, CB1, CB2, CB3, CB4 Whole-park water. Shutting this kills the bathhouse too. High confidence Tested (shut off & observed
title: Sample UtilityBinder Emergency PDF | UtilityBinder

sampleText: Skip to content UtilityBinder Live demo Sample PDF $499 Pilot INTERNAL WORKSHEET The Dave Sheet Every park has a Dave — the person whose head holds twenty years of “the valve is behind the shed” and “don’t dig there.” During the pilot walk we fill this in together. Every claim gets a source, a confidence level, and a date — because “Dave says” is real data once you write down that it’s Dave who said it. Print / Save as PDF PRINTED FOR EMERGENCY REFERENCE ONLY — Staff memory record — NOT a utility locate. Do not rely on this for excavation. Call 811 before digging; private lines may require a private utility locator. Data as of ________. Knowledge Capture — the Dave Sheet Property: ______________________ EMERGENCY REFERENCE ONLY · NOT A UTILITY LOCATE · CALL 811 BEFORE DIGGING Interviewee: ____________________ · Role / years here: ________ · Walked with: ____________________ · Date: ____________ CLAIMS (ONE PER LINE) What they said (verbatim) Basis (memory / repaired it / old map / saw it) Confidence (L/M/H) Photo taken? Pin dropped? Follow-up needed Unknowns & Do-Not-Trust List Property: ______________________ EMERGENCY REFERENCE ONLY · NOT A UTILITY LOCATE · CALL 811 BEFORE DIGGING OPEN QUESTIONS NOBODY COULD ANSWER DO NOT TRUST — KNOWN-WRONG MAPS, ABANDONED LINES, SUSPECT AREAS Anything on this sheet is staff memory, not verified infrastructure data. Before any digging: call 811, and use a private utility locator where private lines may exist. UtilityBinder Emergency utility records for the things only your maintenance person knows. Built for independent campgrounds, RV parks, and outdoor properties. ARTIFACTS Staff Emergency Map demo Sample Emergency PDF The Dave Sheet BEFORE YOU DIG 811 Always. Private lines may also require a private locator. UtilityBinder is for i
title: The Dave Sheet — knowledge capture worksheet | UtilityBinder
